headlines.headline: How to watch 2026 NBA Finals on ABC: Knicks-Spurs schedule
headlines.description: It's time for the 2026 NBA Finals! The Knicks and Spurs go head-to-head to crown this year's champion. Here's how to catch the action on ABC and the ESPN App.

headlines.headline: NBA Finals betting tips, DFS picks for Game 5: Bet on high scoring as Knicks look to clinch
headlines.description: Jim McCormick breaks down Game 5 of the Finals between the Knicks and Spurs and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA Finals: Knicks-Spurs Game 5 preview, X factors, MVP pick
headlines.description: The Knicks have a chance Saturday to win their first NBA title since 1973. Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs, however, are standing in their way.

headlines.headline: How Jalen Brunson became the undisputed king of New York
headlines.description: Brunson's appeal in New York centers around one fundamental idea: People might appreciate glitz and glamour -- but they respect guts and guile even more.

headlines.headline: Why Victor Wembanyama's most dominant skill remains a mystery
headlines.description: What makes the 2026 Defensive Player of the Year so dangerous isn't that he blocks so many shots. It's that he prevents players from shooting in the first place.

headlines.headline: Inside the Shaolin monastery that helped build Victor Wembanyama
headlines.description: Here's how monks in central China helped turn Victor Wembanyama into what he has now become: the most unstoppable force in basketball.

headlines.headline: MSG fits the plot for Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding
headlines.description: As for where they're getting married, has the "Life of a Showgirl" singer already spelled it out for us?

headlines.headline: NFL players make World Cup predictions, weigh in on USMNT
headlines.description: We asked 29 NFL players to weigh in on who would win the Golden Boot and World Cup and also how the United States would fare.

headlines.headline: Miami Dolphins linebackers embracing competition
headlines.description: Miami drafted two off-ball linebackers in April. Veterans Jordyn Brooks and Tyrel Dodson are welcoming them in.

headlines.headline: Broncos coordinator Davis Webb embracing role as playcaller
headlines.description: Sean Payton has rarely ceded playcalling duties in the past, which is a testament to his faith in Webb, his new 31-year-old offensive coordinator.

headlines.headline: Challenges remain, but UFL touting positives of 2026 season
headlines.description: The UFL faces old challenges but has shown growth in ratings, fan interest and expansion plans.

headlines.headline: Frank Ragnow reflects on abrupt Lions retirement, aborted return
headlines.description: One year after announcing his abrupt retirement on social media, former Lions center Frank Ragnow broke his silence on the process and the failed physical that prevented his in-season return.

headlines.headline: Carolina takes 3-2 series lead into game 6 against Vegas
headlines.description: Carolina Hurricanes (53-22-7, in the Metropolitan Division) vs. Vegas Golden Knights (39-26-17, in the Pacific Division)

headlines.headline: Watch Stanley Cup Final Game 6 on Sunday at 8 p.m. ET on ABC and ESPN App

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Hurricanes favored to win Cup, Staal new fave for Conn Smythe
headlines.description: The Carolina Hurricanes are heavy favorites to clinch the second Stanley Cup in team history.

headlines.headline: PWHL's Minnesota Frost re-signs Stecklein, Zumwinkle
headlines.description: Defender Lee Stecklein and forward Grace Zumwinkle are staying put in Minnesota after the PWHL's Frost re-signed both players on Friday.
